stories.headline: UK police accused of double standard in handling stabbing death of 18-year-old Henry Nowak

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 UPDATE: Elon Musk is going BALLISTIC on the double standard of UK police allowing 18-year-old white male Nick Nowak to be KILLED by a perpetrator who cried "he was being racist," instead of going after the killer

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: There were massive international protests over George Floyd and those police involved were severely punished with long prison sentences, yet the police responsible here did not even lose their jobs! An incredibly unjust double-standard!

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: An 18-year-old kid gets stabbed in the street. He’s running for his life, begging for help, and instead of saving him, the police handcuff him while he bleeds out because the attacker claimed “racism.”

stories.headline: Rep. Nancy Mace proposes constitutional amendment requiring natural-born citizenship for Congress, judges, and federal officers

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Ilhan Omar. Shri Thanedar. Pramila Jayapal. All born in foreign countries, none were citizens by birth. All sitting in the United States Congress. All making clear every single day their loyalty is not to America. We just introduced a long overdue joint resolution proposing a constitutional amendment to require Members of Congress, federal judges, and Senate-confirmed officers to be natural born citizens.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Absolutely. This quite obviously should be the law. We already require the president to be a natural born citizen. Why wouldn't we extend that requirement to congress and the judicial branch?

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Nancy Mace files legislation to ban foreign-born elected officials and judges.

stories.headline: Kalshi predicts James Talarico favored to win Texas Senate election

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: I'm not dropping this. Everything Trump has done was done through Executive Orders. Everything will revert back when a Democrat gets into office. For permanent change, everything must be made into a LAW through Congress.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: BREAKING: James Talarico (D) is now favored to win the Texas Senate election

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: AIPAC spent $9 million to take out Rep. Thomas Massie. Trump megadonors spent another $7 million. It was the most ever spent on a House primary race—all because he defied Trump on Gaza and Epstein.

stories.headline: Trump administration rolls back flavored vape regulations after $5M donation from Reynolds American

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Rep. Mary Miller just went MAXIMUM PRESSURE MODE on Senate Leader John Thune, saying the GOP MUST pass not only the SAVE America Act, but legislation that blocks foreign nationals from funding ballot harvesting

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Here's how the corruption works: Thursday: RJ Reynolds donates $5M to Trump Saturday: Trump invites RJR execs to Mar a Lago; execs ask to loosen regs on flavored vapes; Trump calls up RFK Jr. and tells him to change it Friday: FDA changes the policy

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: In the middle of the lunch, Trump called RFK Jr and Dr. Oz and told them he wanted the regulation lifted. Trump’s FDA Commissioner then resigned in protest. Things like this are happening every day. RFK Jr is a total fraud.

stories.headline: Foreign investors sell $22B of South Korean stocks in May, on track for record outflows
stories.body:
Global investors are cashing out of South Korean stocks:

Foreign investors have sold -$22 billion of South Korean stocks so far in May, on track for the largest monthly outflow on record.

Year-to-date, overseas investors have offloaded ~$60 billion in KOSPI stocks, on pace for the largest annual sale on record.

Most of the sales have been concentrated in Samsung and SK Hynix stocks, with ~$20 billion sold in SK Hynix alone year-to-date, including ~$12 billion so far in May.

Since November 2025, foreign investor outflows in SK Hynix have totaled ~$26.7 billion.

Global investors are one of the largest owners of South Korean equities, accounting for ~39% of the total KOSPI index market cap.

Foreign capital is exiting the world's best-performing market at an unprecedented pace.

stories.headline: Kewpie shares no-fry cheese katsu recipe with step-by-step instructions.
stories.body:
Xで保存数6,000超えの揚げないチーズカツレシピをご紹介🍳

【作り方】(1人分)
フライパンに豚ロース肉薄切り(6枚)を2枚ずつ重ねて3組並べ、片面にマヨネーズ(大さじ1)をぬる。パン粉をふり、ひっくり返したら、もう片面にスライスチーズ(3枚)をのせて半分に折る。油(大さじ3)を回しかけ、両面がこんがりするまで揚げ焼きして完成。

stories.headline: Grand jury indicts Raul Castro for conspiracy to kill US nationals
stories.body:
🚨 JUST IN — IT'S OFFICIAL: A grand jury in Florida has INDICTED former Cuban dictator Raul Castro, the brother of Fidel Castro with conspiracy to KlLL US NATIONALS, murder, and more, per Acting AG Blanche

This is related to his role in the 1995 shootdown of two civilian planes over the Florida Straits, kiIIing two Americans.

"These were HUMANITARIAN flights for the rescue and protection of those fleeing oppression," per Blanche

Raul is 94 years old. We'll see how DOJ decides to handle this.
